title: Spicy Thai Pork Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired dish featuring marinated pork, served with a side of tangy peanut sauce.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine fish sauce, coconut milk, curry paste, garlic, and ginger. Blend until smooth.
Add the blended mixture to the sliced pork and mix well. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or overnight.
Thread the marinated pork onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with olive oil and preheat to medium-high heat.
Grill the pork skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning frequently, until cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the peanut sauce by blending peanuts, fish sauce, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Serve the grilled pork skewers with a side of peanut sauce for dipping.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
